body_md.description: The document body, markdown. Inline claim references [C1]..[Ck] index THIS document's claims array 1-based; the assembler renumbers them globally. Empty string only when the record supports nothing — then gaps says so.

claims.description: Every load-bearing assertion in body_md, in the order first referenced. No id field — the assembler assigns global ids.

authority.description: subject-authority evidence never substantiates its own case. Citing subject or agent-derived material as if independent is authority laundering — a named defect.

verification.description: grounded: verbatim support at an archived independent source. unverified: search attempted and failed — say where you looked. contradicted: conflicting signals exist; both cited.

signal_id.description: A real signal id, or 'application' when the only source is the founder's own submission.

quote.description: Verbatim from that source, and it must contain the content the claim asserts — an unrelated quote is a defect even when copied correctly.

contradictions.description: Signal ids in tension with this claim. Surfaced, never smoothed over.

gaps.description: Data this document expects that the record cannot support — 'Cap table: not disclosed'. Flagged, never invented.
